title: Chat Capture, Tag, Learn, Optimize Loop
label: chat-capture-learn-optimize
purpose: Build a working capture → tag → promote → use → optimize loop so that learnings from any chat session land in canonical memory, get tagged consistently, are surfaced to Shay-Shay automatically when relevant, and produce telemetry on which ones actually moved the needle.
why_now: Today's session alone produced multiple high-value learnings (Netlify cannot link git via API, single-Netlify-project model beats two, sites must never commit to Studio history, cowork ghost-session pattern, etc.) and none of them were captured by any system. .wolf/cerebrum.md is hand-written prose; SITE-LEARNINGS.md is 5,425 unstructured lines; captures/ has an extractor but no promoter. The infrastructure is 50% designed, 20% built, 0% promoted into canonical memory.

origin.trigger_record: Session 2026-05-05 — MBSH canonicalization + Ops plan + cowork ghost
origin.summary: User asked: 'now we have a lot of good things that got learn from these chats. how do we capture, tag, learn from and optimize from these'

success_signal: (1) Run `fam-hub capture extract` on this session's transcript and get a v0.2 capture packet. (2) Run `fam-hub memory promote --auto` and at least one vendor-fact entry lands in `memory/vendor-fact/` without human gate. (3) Open a fresh Shay-Shay session in Site Studio with site context = mbsh-reunion and confirm the RELEVANT MEMORY block contains the Netlify-API limitation. (4) After one week, `memory-digest.js` produces a digest in ~/PENDING-REVIEW.md with at least one auto-promoted entry highlighted for retroactive review.
non_goals: Automatic prompt rewriting based on memory

workstreams.title: Capture substrate — schema, taxonomy, store
acceptance: All five files/dirs exist and document the contract.
TAXONOMY.md auto-promote allowlist is the only place auto-promote rules live.

workstreams.title: Capture orchestrator + per-source adapters
outputs: scripts/session-capture.js — dispatcher: detects source, calls adapter, writes packet
scripts/capture-adapters/manual.js (wraps existing capture-insights.js for transcript input)
acceptance: fam-hub capture extract --source <claude-code|cowork|codex|manual> <input> writes a v0.2 packet to captures/inbox/.
Adapter outputs a packet with non-empty extracted[] for any reasonable input.

workstreams.title: Memory promoter (gated + auto-allowlist)
outputs: scripts/memory-promote.js — reads capture/proposal, writes canonical entries
fam-hub memory review <capture-id> — generates proposal from capture
Auto-promote logic: confidence >= 0.85 + type in {vendor-fact, do-not-repeat, bug-pattern} bypasses gate, logs as auto_promoted
Promoted entries: written to memory/<type>/<id>.md, appended to .wolf/cerebrum.md (Standing Rules) + SITE-LEARNINGS.md (when facet=site-execution or type=learning), INDEX.json updated
acceptance: Auto-promote a vendor-fact entry without human approval and verify it lands in store + cerebrum + INDEX.
Reject a low-confidence entry; verify it stays in review/.
Promotion is reversible via fam-hub memory retire <id>.

workstreams.title: Retriever + Shay-Shay context provider
outputs: lib/famtastic/memory/recall.js — recall({facets, types, lifecycle, limit}) → entries[]
lib/shay/memory-context.js — Shay-Shay context provider that injects RELEVANT MEMORY block
Provider registers like workbench.foundation does today
Telemetry: writes 'surfaced' event for each entry shown to Shay
acceptance: recall returns entries scoped to facets+types within the limit.
A fresh Shay-Shay call with site=mbsh-reunion includes a RELEVANT MEMORY block in context.
Shay honors rule + do-not-repeat types as hard constraints in her output.

workstreams.title: Usage telemetry
outputs: Events: surfaced, cited, honored, violated, retired, auto_promoted, promoted, reviewed
acceptance: Every retriever call writes one or more 'surfaced' events.
Promoter writes 'promoted' or 'auto_promoted' on each promotion.
Disabling the setting silences all writes.

workstreams.title: Weekly digest + auto-promote-to-candidate
outputs: scripts/memory-digest.js — runs weekly via cron Mon 9am

Sections: new entries, promotion candidates (3+ recurrence → auto-promote to lifecycle=candidate), stale entries (60d zero surfaced — flag, do not auto-retire), violations, contradictions, auto-promotions retroactive review
Recommendations per entry: promote / retire / merge / split
acceptance: Pattern seen 3+ times across distinct sessions auto-promotes to candidate.
Stale entries are flagged but never auto-retired.
All auto-promotions from prior week appear in digest for retroactive review.

workstreams.title: Extend adversarial review loop to memory promotions
outputs: memory promotions can request --rounds N adversarial review before landing
Reviewer matrix from Ops plan applied: claude↔codex↔gemini, author != reviewer
acceptance: fam-hub memory promote <id> --rounds 2 runs the loop and amends the entry before writing.
Final entry has amendments[] log analogous to plan amendments.

workstreams.title: First end-to-end proof: this session's transcript
acceptance: All four sample entries land in store with correct types, facets, confidence.
INDEX.json reflects them.
Telemetry log has corresponding entries.

scope: ws_capture_orchestrator (manual + claude-code adapters minimum; cowork + codex can iterate)
ws_first_e2e_proof: this session's learnings land as canonical entries
deferred_to_v2: ws_digest_optimizer cron schedule (script can exist, cron can be set later)
ws_adversarial_review_for_memory (depends on Ops plan's loop shipping)

decisions_confirmed.summary: MVP supports all four sources via per-source adapter pattern, one downstream pipeline.
confidence >= 0.85 AND type in {vendor-fact, do-not-repeat, bug-pattern} bypasses human gate. All auto-promotions logged + retroactive review in next weekly digest.
Weekly digest is report + auto-promote high-recurrence to lifecycle=candidate (NOT active). Stale flagged but not auto-retired.
Per-entry markdown files with YAML frontmatter at memory/<type>/<id>.md. SQLite layer added later if query patterns demand it.
Local-only memory/usage.jsonl. Configurable disable. Never transmitted.

known_gaps_opened: Capture adapters for cowork and codex are scaffolded but may need real data to fully validate.
Adversarial review loop for memory promotions depends on the Ops plan's loop implementation.
Cron registration for memory-digest.js requires the schedule plugin / launchd setup separate from this plan.
